text: The city council approved a new public transportation budget after a week of debate.
A viral post claims that drinking silver water makes humans immortal.
Researchers published a peer-reviewed study on improving crop yields in dry regions.
An online article says the moon landing was filmed inside a shopping mall basement.
The health ministry released updated vaccination statistics for the quarter.
A fabricated report says a celebrity adopted a dragon from a secret island.
Local officials opened a new flood relief center for affected families.
A false story claims that Wi-Fi signals can instantly change human DNA.
The education department announced new scholarships for engineering students.
A conspiracy blog insists that clouds are controlled by hidden radio towers.
